# Python Packages (pip install)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# iOS Communication
pymobiledevice3          # [YES] Primary iOS device protocol stack — pure Python, fully bundleable
# pyirecovery            # [NO]  DFU/recovery mode wrapper — excluded, not in current scope.

# Android Communication
adb-shell                # Pure-Python ADB client (supplements platform-tools ADB)

# Backup & Filesystem Parsing
iOSbackup                # Parses Apple MobileSync backup format, Manifest.db
plistlib                 # stdlib — Apple .plist read/write (binary and XML)
construct                # Binary structure parsing (Core Data, protobuf-lite structures)

# Database
# sqlite3 is stdlib — no install needed

# Image & Media
Pillow                   # General image processing
pillow-heif              # HEIC/HEIF decode support — pre-built wheel, replaces pyheif
# pyheif                 # [REMOVED] — requires MSVC to build on Windows; pillow-heif covers this fully

# Audio / Video (all heavy lifting via subprocess to ffmpeg binary)
# No Python package needed — ffmpeg_wrapper.py calls ffmpeg directly

# Contact / Calendar Formats
vobject                  # vCard (.vcf) read/write
icalendar                # iCalendar (.ics) read/write

# WhatsApp Decryption
wa-crypt-tools           # msgstore.db.crypt12/14/15 decryption
pycryptodome             # AES crypto dependency for wa-crypt-tools

# Signal Decryption
sqlcipher3               # SQLCipher (encrypted SQLite) — use sqlcipher3, NOT pysqlcipher3
                         # pysqlcipher3 requires MSVC to compile on Windows and fails on Python 3.14
                         # sqlcipher3 installs cleanly without build tools

# UI / UX (EXE wrapper shell)
rich                     # Terminal UI — progress bars, tables, colored output
click                    # CLI argument parsing for dev/debug mode
customtkinter            # Modern tkinter-based GUI for the main .exe window

# USB / Device Monitoring
pyusb                    # Low-level USB device detection
watchdog                 # Filesystem and device event monitoring

# Packaging / Distribution
pyinstaller              # Compiles Python project to standalone .exe

# Utilities
tqdm                     # Progress bars (CLI fallback / scripted use)
colorlog                 # Colored logging output
python-dateutil          # Robust date parsing for calendar/SMS timestamp conversion
chardet                  # Character encoding detection for SMS body text
requests                 # HTTP (used for Play Store package lookup, optional)

# ── INSTALL COMMAND ───────────────────────────────────────────
# py -m pip install pymobiledevice3 iOSbackup construct Pillow pillow-heif vobject icalendar python-dateutil adb-shell wa-crypt-tools pycryptodome sqlcipher3 rich click customtkinter tqdm colorlog pyusb watchdog chardet requests pyinstaller

# ── KNOWN ISSUES (Python 3.14 / Windows) ─────────────────────
# pylzss, lzfse — transitive deps of pyimg4 → pymobiledevice3
#   These fail to build (need MSVC). pyimg4 parses Apple firmware Image4/IPSW
#   format — outside project scope. pymobiledevice3 core functionality unaffected.
#   Safe to leave unresolved.
#
# pysqlcipher3 — fails on Python 3.14 / Windows without MSVC. Replaced by sqlcipher3.
# pyheif       — fails on Python 3.14 / Windows without MSVC. Replaced by pillow-heif.
